summary: Editable D2 JSON draft for human review.
general_information: The HOEGH GANNET is a combined FSRU/LNG carrier vessel built by Hyundai Heavy Industries. It has an overall length of 294.07m, width of 46m, and depth of 26m with a design draught of 11.6m. The vessel has four GTT Mark III membrane cargo tanks with a combined capacity of 170,000m^3 and is powered by four W rtsil 50DF engines. It has a regasification rate of 1,000mmcfd and can send out regasified LNG at the maximum rate of 1,000mmscfd.

standard.name: DNV_GMOD_INTERNAL_DEFAULT
standard.description: Default maritime taxonomy used by the application for vessel data extraction, validation and classification.
standard.rule: AI must classify extracted data using this taxonomy first. Missing categories must be proposed as extensions, not invented as final nodes.
